rationale: Educ. Code §33.9031 governs before-school and after-school programs. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may establish before-school or after-school programs for students enrolled in elementary or middle school grades.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
